Support

We've got you.

One person, but a very attentive one.

How the apps work

All Pancho Whampoa apps are offline calculators. There are no accounts, no logins, and no syncing. Everything runs on your device — just enter your numbers and get your answer.

Frequently asked questions

  • Do I need an account? No. Open the app and start calculating.
  • Does the app save my data? Your inputs stay on your device. We never see them.
  • Does it work without internet? Yes, fully offline.
  • I found a bug or a wrong calculation. Please email us — this is exactly the kind of thing we want to know about.
  • Can I request a feature? Absolutely. We read every email.

Refunds

Refunds are handled directly by Apple. Visit reportaproblem.apple.com and Apple will take care of it.

Questions, bug reports, or just want to say hi —

support@panchowhampoa.com
